predicted_return_cluster_report.representative_news_method: Label centroid body_emb_cluster_pc* values are inverse-transformed to the original body_emb_* space, then matched to source news by cosine similarity.
predicted_return_cluster_report.profile_feature_ranking_method: For each label centroid, original-scale feature values are compared against the global profile mean and sorted by absolute z-difference.
